name: com.astral.runtime
description: Unity bindings and package layout for Astral Runtime, including native C ABI wrappers, streaming session APIs, embeddings, and CPU/CUDA backend packaging support.

samples.description: Frame-polled UTF-8 generation, request status, cancellation, and deterministic cleanup
Agent prompts, persistent history, memory context, and structured tool calls
Document chunking, embeddings, memory search, and index persistence
Prompt caches, LoRA adapters, stop sequences, grammar, and tokenization
Texture and audio generation inputs with multimodal embeddings
Independent frame-polled conversations sharing one model executor
